title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1021 - Revocation of erroneous filing and curative documents, fee
text:
351.1021.  Revocation of erroneous filing and curative documents, fee. — Upon notification that a filing by a cooperative has been made in error and receipt of a court order directing him or her to do so, the secretary of state shall revoke the erroneous filing and authorize a curative document to be filed.  A filing fee of five dollars shall be charged for any such revocation and subsequent curative filing.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
